faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Maspeth home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in woolens or natural fiber fabrics, silky tubes or cases in closets, adult moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae or webbing on stored clothing. You may also notice damage to rugs, upholstered furniture, or stored blankets. Our Maspeth technicians provide thorough inspections to identify the extent of any infestation.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of clothes moth control in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: Pricing between $550 and $5,000 depends on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, the number of affected rooms, and the type of treatment required. Small, localized infestations in single closets cost less, while whole-home treatments for severe infestations in larger Maspeth homes require more extensive service and follow-up visits.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and fabrics?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use targeted treatments specifically designed to eliminate clothes moths while being safe for your family, pets, and delicate fabrics. Our methods include pheromone traps, targeted applications to infested areas, and heat treatments when appropriate. We provide detailed preparation instructions to ensure your clothing and textiles are properly protected during treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a clothes moth problem in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Maspeth residents dealing with clothes moth infestations. Early intervention is crucial to prevent further damage to your valuable textiles and clothing. Our team will assess the situation, implement immediate control measures, and develop a comprehensive treatment plan to eliminate the infestation and prevent future problems.
